highlights: Resolved 150+ code quality and security vulnerabilities identified via SonarQube, applying secure coding practices to improve system reliability.
Led modernization of legacy DAL Generator, migrating from Oracle to PostgreSQL and delivering multi-million-dollar annual licensing cost savings.
Debugged database and application-level issues across legacy systems, performing root cause analysis and implementing fixes that reduced resolution time.
Collaborated with engineering, QA, and product teams to break down technical requirements and deliver scalable, well-tested solutions.
Participated in full Agile/Scrum cycle; sprint planning, standups, retrospectives; using Azure DevOps to manage tasks, track issues, and communicate status to stakeholders.
Designed and consumed RESTful APIs to support cross-service integrations, applying HTTP best practices and JSON data contracts.
